executiveSummary.narrative: The session consumed a high volume of tokens due to significant redundant reasoning loops in the verification phase. Approximately 18% of the total tokens were spent re-deriving context that was already explicitly provided. Implementing the recommended guardrail adjustments will dramatically reduce latency and API costs.

findings.description: The LLM abandoned its analysis mid-paragraph and restarted completely.
Context block for 'application_logs' was passed but never referenced.

remediationPlan.change: Add explicit instruction: 'Do not restart analysis unless a critical contradiction is found.'
remediationPlan.risk: May slightly increase the chance of minor logical inconsistencies slipping through.
